COURT HEARING TRANSCRIPT — CASE NO. DC/S 0056/2024
Date: 3 March 2024
Before: District Judge Tan Peck Choo

EXAMINATION OF PW1 (Ms. Adeline Ng):
Counsel: Ms. Ng, can you describe your movements on 1 March 2024?
PW1: Yes. I left home at 8:00am and arrived at my workplace at Raffles Place at 8:45am. I was at the office the entire day until 6:00pm.

Counsel: Did anything unusual occur?
PW1: No. It was a normal work day. I had lunch with my colleague Ms. Chen at the office canteen at 1:00pm.

EXAMINATION OF PW2 (Ms. Chen Li Mei):
Counsel: Ms. Chen, were you with Ms. Ng on 1 March 2024?
PW2: Yes. We had lunch together at the office canteen at around 1:00pm to 1:45pm. We then both returned to our desks at 2:00pm.

EXAMINATION OF PW3 (Mr. Rajesh Kumar, Security Officer):
Counsel: Did you observe Ms. Ng on 1 March 2024?
PW3: Yes. The access logs show Ms. Ng entered the building at 8:43am and exited at 6:02pm. These records are from the automated entry system.

END OF TRANSCRIPT
